meta.title: Didi Cohen | Rosen Method Bodywork in Jerusalem
meta.description: Rosen Method Bodywork sessions with Didi Cohen in Rehavia, Jerusalem.
meta.ogDescription: A quiet space for attentive touch, body awareness and meeting yourself.

brand.name: Didi Cohen
brand.aria: Didi Cohen — return to the top

hero.title: A space to listen to ourselves through the body
hero.intro: Rosen Method Bodywork in a quiet, attentive space in Rehavia, Jerusalem.

intro.title: When there is room to soften, something new can become possible.
intro.body: Through gentle touch and conversation, we can meet the body with curiosity—not as something to fix, but as a living part of who we are.

about.title: Presence, curiosity and a human meeting
about.lead: I’m Didi Cohen, a Rosen Method Bodywork intern based in Rehavia, Jerusalem.
about.body1: I began studying Rosen Method in 2019, completed the training program and began my internship in 2023. I hold a BSW in Social Work from Bar-Ilan University and also work as a software developer—different worlds that have each taught me something about listening, complexity and change.
about.body2: I’m married to Maayan and father to Pelly Fani. Alongside individual Rosen Method sessions, I am a Kundalini Yoga teacher and teacher trainer. Together with Maayan, I care for Beit Shel Yoga, a Jerusalem studio and community where I teach a weekly group and offer private classes.
about.credential1: Rosen Method Bodywork studies, 2019–2023 · currently an intern
about.credential4: Kundalini Yoga teacher and teacher trainer

services.title: Listening to what the body already knows
services.intro: The session offers time and space to listen to the body at your own pace.

rosen.title: Rosen Method Bodywork
rosen.lead: A gentle practice that combines attentive touch and conversation to invite awareness of chronic muscular tension and patterns in our lives.
rosen.body: A session takes place on a massage table. Touch responds, listens and makes space. There is no goal you have to achieve; sensations, breath, words or quiet can each be part of the meeting. Rosen Method is a complementary wellbeing practice and is not a replacement for medical or mental-health care.
rosen.note: In Rehavia, Jerusalem · By appointment · Offered as part of my supervised internship

yoga.title: Kundalini Yoga
yoga.lead: A practice combining movement, breath, attention and rest, adapted to the people in the room.
yoga.body: Classes offer a structured opportunity to move, breathe and notice. You do not need previous experience or a particular level of flexibility. I teach a weekly group at Beit Shel Yoga and offer private sessions that can be shaped around your pace and needs.
yoga.note: Weekly group class · Private classes by arrangement · Jerusalem

meta.title: Didi Cohen | Kundalini Yoga in Jerusalem

hero.title: A space to practice, breathe and listen
hero.intro: Group and private Kundalini Yoga classes in Jerusalem.

intro.title: Move at your own pace and meet what is present now.
intro.body: The practice combines movement, breath, attention and rest. No previous experience or particular level of flexibility is needed.

about.lead: I’m Didi Cohen, a Kundalini Yoga teacher and teacher trainer based in Jerusalem.
about.body1: I teach a weekly group at Beit Shel Yoga and offer private classes shaped around your pace and needs.
about.body2: Together with Maayan, I care for Beit Shel Yoga—a Jerusalem studio and community offering space for practice and connection. My background also includes a BSW from Bar-Ilan University, studies in Rosen Method Bodywork and work as a software developer; these fields deepen the way I listen to the body, the person, complexity and each practitioner’s individual pace.
about.credential1: Kundalini Yoga teacher and teacher trainer
about.credential2: Weekly group practice at Beit Shel Yoga
about.credential4: Rosen Method Bodywork studies, 2019–2023 · currently an intern
